title: If you could fight the Angels without an Eva
display_title: If you could fight the Angels without an Eva
wikitext:
[]: If you could fight the Angels without an Eva? Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Jul 03, 2009 4:20 pm If there was a way you could fight an Angel without an Eva and you could pick how and what to fight it with, how would you? I would have the people down in the laboratory to construct a super-powerful giant reptilian monster and transfer my mind into it. In my first battle I would jump on Sachiel, claw his bone face off, knock him down, bite his arms off, and then finish him off with a powerful radioactive beam from my mouth. Doesn't have to be detailed or serious like mine, but I just wanted to go into detail. It can be silly if you want.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 03, 2009 4:28 pm It's obviously a job for the lolis at B.A.B.E.L -- they can do AT-Fields already , so Angels should be no big deal. Especially as PANDRA might well join in.

[]: Post by Zaque » Fri Jul 03, 2009 5:20 pm Hire Kaworu

[]: Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 03, 2009 5:56 pm I'd beat them with their own mindfuck tactics by unleashing some sort of lovecraftian horror.

[]: Post by ZapX » Fri Jul 03, 2009 6:31 pm The LOL.

[]: Post by Duke » Fri Jul 03, 2009 7:52 pm I'd spam them to death. Seriously.

[]: Post by Captain_Morgan » Fri Jul 03, 2009 11:44 pm I wouldn't want to fight them without an Eva. I wouldn't want to fight them in an Eva. I'd rather have someone else do it so I wouldn't have to worry about being a main character in an anime where everyone in it gets mindfucked and then tanged. But, if it was unavoidable and "anything goes," I would have Sammaeloo transfer his mind into Godzilla and fight them while I get drunk watching the fight and making bets with my colleagues on which of the two would win.

[]: Post by i_Love_Asuka » Sat Jul 04, 2009 1:43 am Emperor-Class Titan... screw AT-field, i just step on the damn angel! http://cfs8.tistory.com/original/36/tistory/2008/09/12/10/14/48c9c285ed3e9 ^for those who doesn't know 'bout titans

[]: Post by Timstuff » Sat Jul 04, 2009 3:04 am I'd trick this guy into doing it for me: [URL=http://img440.imageshack.us/i/godzilla.jpg/] [/URL]

[]: Post by Cypher » Sat Jul 04, 2009 9:09 am An Apocalypse class battleship would do nicely; just hit em with a lance strike from low orbit while I sit back and enjoy a whiskey.

[]: Post by Axell » Sat Jul 04, 2009 10:53 am I'd tell them 2+2=5 and watch their heads explode. Oh wait thats robots....invite them to a picnic and hope they spare my life.

[]: Post by Defectron » Sat Jul 04, 2009 12:42 pm I would turn into my self insert character froma certain rpg I was in, then I would grow really big and throw all of them into my own sea of dirac (yes this version of me has a dirac sea)

[]: Post by Dartz » Sat Jul 04, 2009 1:01 pm Several Kilotons of N2 mine can dent them. Several Megatons of ex-Soviet missiles will do some harm Several Megatons ex-Soviet missilesrepeatedly will do a lot of harm. And leave most of the world a radioactive hellhole, but it's either some of us die, or all of us die./

[]: Post by DanteNeverCry » Sat Jul 04, 2009 1:32 pm I'd call the PowerPuff Girls

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Jul 04, 2009 2:05 pm All I have to do is snap my fingers and no more Angels ;). Infinity Gauntlet FTW!

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Sat Jul 04, 2009 2:20 pm 200 Proof and Ornette's guitar.

[]: Post by schismatics » Sat Jul 04, 2009 2:31 pm I'd take off my shirt, oil up and starting singing "Everytime We Touch, I GET THIS FEELING, blah blah blah blah"" That will kill anything.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Jul 04, 2009 2:33 pm ^by dying from laughing too hard, AMIRITE??

[]: Post by TheRatherDVD » Sat Jul 04, 2009 5:48 pm Since Timstuff already has Gojira then I'll settle for....... The friend of all children: GAMERA!

[]: Post by DanteNeverCry » Sat Jul 04, 2009 5:54 pm Jet Jaguar FTW!
